sanskrit: तेषां ज्ञानी नित्ययुक्त एकभक्तिर्विशिष्यते | प्रियो हि ज्ञानिनोऽत्यर्थमहं स च मम प्रिय: ||
transliteration: teṣāṃ jñānī nitya-yukta eka-bhaktir viśiṣyate | priyo hi jñānino ’tyartham ahaṃ sa ca mama priyaḥ ||
literal_meaning: Among them, the one who is wise, ever-integrated, single-pointed in devotion, is the most exalted; for I am exceedingly dear to the knower, and he is dear to Me.
contextual_meaning: Among four types of spiritual seekers, the person who combines self-knowledge with steady, exclusive love-devotion is psychologically healthiest and most intimate with life itself.
psychological_state: Secure-autonomous: high insight plus warm relational engagement; mind and heart are online together without splitting.
trigger_scenario: After years of therapy and meditation, you no longer chase experiences or people to feel complete; you sit with your partner in silence and feel equally close to yourself, them, and something bigger—no performance, just presence.
anchor_text: Let knowledge bloom into single-pointed love, and love will carry you home.
